name: Apple-Pecan Muffins
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Green apples, coarsely grated (about 2 large)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Grease 12 muffin cups.
3. Sift all-purpose flour, baking soda, ground cinnamon, and salt into a medium bowl.
4. In a large bowl, combine sugar, oil, egg, lemon juice, vanilla extract, and grated lemon peel; whisk until well blended.
5. Mix in the dry ingredients, then add the grated apples and chopped pecans.
6. Spoon 1/3 cup batter into each prepared muffin cup.
7. Bake until a tester inserted into the center comes out clean, about 35 minutes.
8. Turn muffins out onto a wire rack; cool slightly.
9. Serve warm. (Makes about 12)
